notes.sg-composite-material-concrete-and-cemen: This topic and fly ash/ground granulated blast-furnace slag are all components of cement, which is a type of composite material. Portland cement is a good representative label.
notes.sg-composite-material-fly-ash: This is a component of cement, which is a type of composite material. Portland cement is a good representative label.
notes.sg-composite-material-ground-granulated-: This is a component of cement, which is a type of composite material. Portland cement is a good representative label.
notes.sg-composite-material-selective-laser-me: This is a specific additive manufacturing process for metal powders. Metal powder is a more general and appropriate label.
notes.sg-composite-material-selective-laser-si: This is a specific additive manufacturing process for metal powders. Metal powder is a more general and appropriate label.
notes.sg-tissue-engineering-regenerative-medic: Regenerative medicine is a broad field that heavily relies on stem cells, making it a good candidate to merge into 'stem cell'.
notes.sg-tissue-engineering-cell-biology: Cell biology is a foundational science for tissue engineering and stem cell research. Merging into 'stem cell' captures the applied aspect.
notes.sg-tissue-engineering-stem-cell: This is a core concept and can serve as a good anchor for related topics.
notes.sg-tissue-engineering-cell-culture: Cell culture is a technique often used in stem cell research and tissue engineering. Merging into 'stem cell' is appropriate.
notes.sg-tissue-engineering-3d-bioprinting: 3D bioprinting is a method that utilizes cells and biomaterials, often stem cells, for tissue engineering. Merging into the more general '3D printing in biomedical research' is suitable.
notes.sg-tissue-engineering-self-healing-hydro: Self-healing hydrogels are a material science aspect of tissue engineering, distinct from the biological focus of other topics.
notes.sg-tissue-engineering-extracellular-matr: Extracellular matrix is a key component in tissue engineering.
notes.sg-tissue-engineering-mesenchymal-stem-c: Mesenchymal stem cells are a specific type of stem cell relevant to tissue engineering.
notes.sg-tissue-engineering-natural-polymers: Natural polymers are important biomaterials used in tissue engineering.
notes.sg-drug-delivery-nanoparticle-based-drug: This is a specific type of drug carrier.
notes.sg-drug-delivery-drug-carrier: This is a more general term for carriers.
notes.sg-drug-delivery-cancer-therapy: The original label is too broad; it should be specific to drug delivery.
notes.sg-drug-delivery-controlled-release: The original label is too broad; it should be specific to drug delivery.
notes.sg-drug-delivery-surface-modification: The original label is too broad; it should be specific to drug delivery.
notes.sg-drug-delivery-iron-oxide: This is a specific type of oxide nanoparticle.
notes.sg-drug-delivery-oxide-nanoparticle: This is a more general term for nanoparticles.

notes.sg-waste-management-carbon-dioxide: Relabeled to be more specific to waste management context.
notes.sg-waste-management-carbon-sequestration: Merged into carbon dioxide as it's a specific form of carbon management.
notes.sg-energy-storage-intermittent-energy-so: This is a sub-topic of distributed generation.
notes.sg-energy-storage-electric-power-system: This is a sub-topic of distributed generation.
notes.sg-energy-storage-wind-power: Relabeled to be more specific to energy storage.
notes.sg-energy-storage-transition-metal: Relabeled to be more specific to energy storage.
